production_objective: Convert preserved, case-scoped tool exports into reviewable import records, accepted observations, verified entity intelligence, reproducible dossier snapshots, and controlled export-readiness packages without allowing adapters or automation to assign truth, merge entities, approve claims, or publish dossiers.

roadmap.capability: planning, compatibility, privacy, schema ownership, and non-duplication gate
case-scoped universal import envelopes and adapter contract
immutable import manifests, artifact bindings, deterministic records, and quarantine
controlled 46 Montreal pilot and scope-aware review queue
analyst import review and explicit observation promotion
guided entity, claim, conflict, and alternative review orchestration
dossier snapshot review, redaction, and export-readiness preparation
integrated operations workspace and browser E2E
pilot evidence, release validation, and program closure

authoritative_reuse.case_scope_and_privacy: existing case, purpose, authorization, minimization, sensitive-context, retention, and privacy controls
authoritative_reuse.artifact_evidence: v29 accepted evidence artifacts and append-only custody history
authoritative_reuse.source_registry: v36.1 source records and claim-type reliability profiles
authoritative_reuse.canonical_observations: v36.2 canonical observation envelopes and quarantine review
authoritative_reuse.entity_resolution: v36.3 candidate assessments and human decisions
authoritative_reuse.claim_verification: v36.5 dimensional verification and alternative ranking
authoritative_reuse.export_and_publication: existing quality, redaction, approval, audit, bundle, manifest, export, and publication gates
